creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
I cannot reproduce it.

% pkg info -x sqlparse
py27-sqlparse-0.2.0

% python2.7
Python 2.7.12 (default, Oct 25 2016, 05:33:29)
[GCC 4.2.1 Compatible FreeBSD Clang 3.8.0 (tags/RELEASE_380/final 262564)] on freebsd11
Type "help", "copyright", "credits" or "license" for more information.
>>> import sqlparse
>>> dir(sqlparse.utils)
['LINE_MATCH', 'SPLIT_REGEX', '__builtins__', '__doc__', '__file__', '__name__', '__package__', 'consume', 'contextmanager', 'deque', 'imt', 'indent', 'itertools', 'offset', 're', 'recurse', 'remove_quotes', 'split_unquoted_newlines', 'text_type']
